entry.title: Settlement Management - Condition Contract - Business Volume Selection Criteria
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have some questions about condition contract. 

1. What is the relation between contract header customer and customer mentioned in business volume selection criteria?

2. Business volume selection criteria check total invoice amount for sales rebate which we see at WB2R_BUSVOL in REBV field. I have two questions here.

i) I found in SPRO configuration that its consider all subtotal fields of VBRP & NETWR and one another field. But I am clear on caudation part.

ii) Dose it considers only F2 invoice or all other invoice also such as S1, G2, L2, P5, P8,

3. How can I check invoice no wise REBV in WB2R_BUSVOL?

Thanks,

Arindam

entry.title: Re: Integration of DMS and PM for Document Attachment
entry.content:
Hi @Silambarasan ,

you did not share the SPRO to enable the DMS bottom on the Maintenance Order, only on Notification.

Do you have any idea how can I enable the DMS feature at the Maintenance Order?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed
entry.content:
Ciao Juwin.

The problem is that TEXT is not a structure so these suggested  variants cannot be used.

... { struc-(comp) } 
  | { dref->(comp_name) } 
  | { COMPONENT comp OF STRUCTURE struc } ...

I suggest to declare a proper structure like my_text and to put or duplicate the text symbol's values there as subcomponents.

entry.title: Two Group Currency Extension Version with the same currency - error msg
entry.content:
I created a Group Currency Extension Version in automatic run mode with GBP as the currency. After conducting various tests, we realized that it is better to have the Group Currency Extension Version in manual run mode.

The problem arises when I attempt to create a new Group Currency Extension Version in GBP. The system displays an error message indicating that it is not possible to create a new version of the Group Currency Extension Version because one already exists in GBP.

entry.title: Overloaded - Load not able to complete GI(OUTB)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have an issue where the load is overloaded for the inbound delivery (5931362) EWM-1379.Please need your support to rectify the issue.

regards

Shiva

entry.title: Re: Costs & Revenues getting mapped against separate WBS...
entry.content:
Hi @Ken_Melching 

I feel like Archimedes now, only I do not have a bathtub. Thank you. And thank you @RogerEarle, I figured out the method and then I saw your answer.

Solution: Right-click on WBS Element column and choose Select Hierarchy.

Just click Search and you will get an SAP default hierarchy for WBS. Then click OK.

Viola! We have the desired result, as answered by @RogerEarle. We can then just sort it by the ID, and also expand the hierarchy.

Regards,

Pratap.

entry.title: Import Sales Dimensions
entry.content:
Hi, I tried to import the "Sales dimensions" like the length, width, height and volume through "Import From Excel" and "DTW" but it's not updating even after not getting an error while uploading. 

Are there a working templates with an example regarding the same. 

Note: There are many UoM for the same item and I am trying to upload for all of them, but even when I tried for one UoM I got the same result as explained above.

entry.title: Re: SAP SFSF Integration Center
entry.content:
Hi Hayey,

Usually we use the ''Job Information (EmpJob)'' Entity to get the any of data related to employee with all the employment and status as well 
In it you can find all the field as well as custom MDF data 

Select this "EmpJob" entity and select the field which need, if additional data try to go into other NAv entity

Regard,
Arun Singh

entry.title: Re: Reading Messages from PI System
entry.content: Hi, I am getting the target payload and not fetching the source payload by using getMessageBytesJavaLangStringBoolean, please suggest is there any settings missing.

entry.title: Re: PowerDesigner NODE.JS update
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, it is indeed possible for you to upgrade node.js on your own.
You just need to ensure that you upgrade to the same major version of node.js, i.e. version 18.
PD 16.7 SP07 supports node.js 18.20.4.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @Kushal_Banerjee the probem is I don't have any user to log on  . It was my firts access, so I was tryind to import the License . Bellow step.

"

  1. Logon to your ABAP system with the user SAP*, client 000, same password as for DEVELOPER (DEVELOPER , client 001, is locked).

"

So I understand that I don't have any user to log on SAP.

 

Regards,

Márcio

entry.title: Re: Onboarding Release - Enhancements to New Hire Onboard...
entry.content:
Hi,

Check the RBP Permission for the Onboardee as it required the RBP Permission
As standard it shows locked till the Step Process as per the order of Process Variant
But it still show Locked if Onboardee doesn't have necessary RBP Permission

hello

entry.title: App "Define selections" - how to extract relevant data based on acquisition date
entry.content:
Hi all,

n the Fiori app "Define Selections," there are two fields: "Period of Acquisition" and "Year of Acquisition."

I would expect this fields to enable the retrieval and filtering of data (across all consolidation units, financial statement items, subitems, document types, and other relevant criteria/fields specified in the selection) based on the assignment date of the first consolidation (as specified by the "Year of First Consolidation" field in the "Manage Consolidation Group Structure" app).

However, after conducting some tests, it appears that the filters "Period of Acquisition" and "Year of Acquisition" are not functioning as expected. Actually, they aren't working at all.

Does anyone have any suggestions on how to use them or know if I might be overlooking something?

The purpose is creating a selection which would extract the consolidation units ( and  relevant fs items, document types) acquired in the previous year.

TIA for any insight

entry.title: Knowledge Graph and GraphRAG: Implementation with SAP AI Core (Generative AI Hub) and Future Perspec
entry.content:
Greetings,

We are currently exploring the implementation of GraphRAG using HANA Cloud / Datasphere Knowledge Graph. We are looking to leverage SAP AI Core (Generative AI Hub) for this purpose and are in the process of gathering information on the specific implementation methods. However, we are currently facing a lack of detailed information and would greatly appreciate your expertise and insights.

Specifically, we would be grateful if you could provide guidance on the following points:

Specific Implementation Methods for GraphRAG using SAP AI Core (Generative AI Hub):

To realize GraphRAG, which functionalities of SAP AI Core should we utilize, and how can we effectively integrate them with HANA Cloud (Datasphere) Knowledge Graph?
Could you provide detailed information such as concrete architecture examples, implementation steps, and considerations?
For instance, what components (models, pipelines, etc.)
should be built within AI Core, and how can we optimally orchestrate query execution against the Knowledge Graph, vector search, and response generation?

Comparison of Architecture with Microsoft's GraphRAG:

As a general concept for GraphRAG, there is an architecture proposed by Microsoft, as referenced here: https://microsoft.github.io/graphrag/
(Considering aspects such as Community Report generation, Global Search, and Local Search).
Is the GraphRAG architecture within the SAP environment similar to Microsoft's architecture?
If there are differences, could you please elaborate on SAP's unique architecture or the optimized GraphRAG approach for the SAP environment?
In particular, we are interested in understanding the unique advantages and characteristics of SAP's GraphRAG when leveraging Knowledge Graphs.

We look forward to receiving your valuable information and opinions.
Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Instance Refresh from SF Prod to Test- IPSADMIN admin...
entry.content:
Hi Kartik,

As this is a prerequisite, before refresh you should have at least one user with the same email id and Password , which we use IPSADMIN

If it is not then you might have issue to login in the system after Refresh, because refresh is only for SuccessFactors System, and after refresh when the next sync job will run it will fetch the user data as per the new system 

So which create issue in the login which could impact to change setting and configuration in IAS also

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Interview Timezone
entry.content: Yes in the email the time will be as per Interview Scheduler which is Recruiter but if candidate check on the Career Site then it will show per the Candidate Location

entry.title: Re: Missing SAP predelivered content in Description of dangerous goods packages

But based on your response, I would point you to the SAP Note 2972572. I will also consult my manager and see if she has more to add because I am not familiar with anything from the "classic setup"

entry.title: Re: Opinion about ALM Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
Hi, Hugo13,

I already worked in 5 SAP CALM implementation projects that was using Features capabilities and I have some experience.  The use of SAP CALM for transport management is evolving, and some functionalities are still being improved, for example the automatic TR Checks before importing to PRD is a great addition, but for QA still you need to run manually via /SDF/TRCHECK .

The blog from @DoloresCorrea  is indeed a great resource, especially for those coming from a ChaRM background. (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/first-steps-to-work-with-sap-cloud-alm-deployment-scenario-for-sap-abap/ba-p/13627068) .  My recommendation would be to set up a dummy scenario so you can test and gain confidence.

let me know if we can help you with something. 
WenSolman

entry.title: Remove the approval process for purchase requisitions
entry.content:
I want to remove the approval process for purchase requisitions.

Process: Operation Outsourcing

A purchase requisition is automatically generated from the production order, but when creating a purchase order from the purchase requisition, an error occurs because the purchase requisition is not approved. Therefore, I want to proceed without approval for the purchase requisition. Please advise.

entry.title: Re: How to hide some "screen" on MDG
entry.content:
Hi

CBA does not have role but you can use Workflow Step for this.......if the concern is the data privacy, i think it would be good if you can explore data masking which helps in hiding the data without the need to do any UI changes

entry.title: Re: Usage report for C4C (by user and duration)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm looking for a report that shows usage of C4C, by login and time, and so far I've found the following.

In Silverlight --> Admin --> General Settings --> Usage and Response Time Statistics

The first report 'Usage Statistics' is ok from a high-level perspective

The other (beta) reports just open a blank screen to me. I think I've seen these in the past and they should be able to tell me who has logged into the system and their duration. Am I just dreaming or should this work...or is there another out-of-the-box report I can run to get what i'm looking for? Want to download the report

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Requirement to Verify Group Journal Entries
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have implemented the Group Journal Entry Workflow in our system. But we are unable to verify Group Journal Entries were reviewed through the workflow. We wish to confirm is there a similar app to Verify General Journal Entries? 

We intend to see the group journal entries status, the submitter's name, and the name of the person who accepted or rejected them etc.

Regards,

Abha Hardikar

entry.title: Re: how to use standard gender field in custom MDF as thi...
entry.content:
Hi @SFEC31 

The Standard gender field is defined in Picklist, "gender". 

In the MDF object at field select the Data Type as Picklist and at valid values source type gender, so the standard gender field gets associated.

Thanks

Arun

entry.title: Re: PCE / AWS Connectivity qestionnaire/Transit Gateway Q...
entry.content:
@SUSUMU_ITO 

I translated from Japanese to English your questions;

Q1: If there are multiple VPCs communicating with PCE AWS, do I need to provide all VPC IDs?

Yes, you need to provide the VPC IDs of all VPCs that will communicate with RISE PCE on AWS.

Transit Gateway acts as a hub to interconnect multiple VPCs. If you intend to connect multiple VPCs in your customer environment to PCE AWS via Transit Gateway, all VPCs that need to communicate with PCE AWS must be attached to the Transit Gateway. SAP will configure that. 

Q2: If there are configuration changes, such as adding customer VPCs, will additional settings be required on the PCE side?

Also yes, when you add a VPC, it needs to be attached to the Transit Gateway, and routes need to be configured between that VPC and PCE AWS.

  • Configuration Steps for AWS Transit Gateway - SAP HANA on AWS: This document describes the configuration steps for SAP HANA on AWS using AWS Transit Gateway, check it out. https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sap/latest/sap-hana/sap-oip-configuration-steps-for-aws-transit-gateway.html

entry.title: Ability to read xlsx file in SAP CI or to send xlsx file from SAP CI to S4HANA and read the excel
entry.content:
Hello,

   I would like to know if there is any possibility to read xlsx file in SAP CI ( or ) do we have any other option to send xlsx file from SAP CI and can read the excel file in the ABAP.

 

Thanks,

Shiva.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements Smart Filter - Date picker Behaviour
entry.content:
Hi Vijay, 

it looks like the dynamic date range flag is set to true somewhere and is enabled during the deployment. (refer to the annotations in the gateway, manifest file or in the smart control code) 

https://www.sap.com/design-system/fiori-design-web/v1-96/ui-elements/dynamic-date-range-2/?external

to override the behaviour , try to apply useDateRangeType="false" property explicitly to the SmartFilterBar control
 
Refer to the api documentation samples for more info  on this (Smart Filter Bar with DateRangeType and Smart Filter Bar with controlConfiguration conditionType customDateRangeType)
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/entity/sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar.SmartFilterBar
 
Regards
Virinchy

Arun

entry.title: Batch vs Real-Time integration between MD365 and SAP – Which is better?
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

I’m working on connecting Microsoft Dynamics 365 with SAP. I’m trying to decide between batch integration and real-time integration. We need to sync important data like orders, inventory, and customer details. I want to know which approach makes the most sense.

What are the main pros and cons of each method? Here’s what I’m curious about:

  1. How does each method affect the performance of MD365 and SAP? Does one method put more stress on the systems?
  2. How do we keep data consistent? Real-time sounds great, but what if there’s a network problem or sync fails?
  3. How do errors get handled? Is it easier to fix issues with batch or real-time? What strategies do you use for both?
  4. For business needs like order fulfillment and inventory updates, which method is usually better?

If anyone has tips or experience with this kind of setup, I’d love to hear from you. Thanks a lot for your help!

Ivan Farafonov

HireDynamicsDevelopers

Hopes it helps,

Itay

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Hamburg am 17.03.2025 um 18:30 Uhr in der Alsterlagune
entry.content:
Am Montag, den 17.03.2025 findet der nächste SAP Stammtisch Hamburg statt!
Wir treffen uns ab 18:30h in der Alsterlagune, Ballindamm 14b, 20039 Hamburg.

Unser Thema an diesem Abend wird vor allem die Organisation und Inhalte der in diesem Jahr stattfindenden Events, wie die ABAPConf 2025 (am 4. Juni, Hamburg wird einer der Eventstandorte sein) und der SAP Inside Track am 27. September, sein.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Ideen und Anregungen dazu.

Meldet euch an und freut euch auf gute Gemeinschaft, tolle Gespräche und einen schönen Ausblick auf die Hamburger Alster.

entry.title: ** FPM ** ABAP Message Channel Bindings
entry.content:
ABAP Channel Message triggers UIBB refresh when opening a popup

Problem Description:
In FPM application, ABAP Channel Message is used to refresh a UIBB, for example, updating the "time in yard" field for transportation unit. There is a button in the toolbar that opens a pop-up ("Message to Infoboard").

The pop-up serves as a message input window.

However, when the pop-up opens, a refresh is triggered every 30 seconds, causing the user’s input to reset.

Implementation:
I attempted to unbind and rebind the channel using the binding manager:

  • When opening the pop-up: I call UNBIND in the GET_DATA method of the UIBB popup feeder
  • When closing the pop-up: I call BIND in the PROCESS_EVENT method of the UIBB popup feeder

However, after closing the popup, the binding is not restored.

Observations:
When reopening the popup, the channel binds again. It seems that after the OPEN_DIALOG event, some kind of refresh is occurring. Does anyone know what exactly triggers this update when opening a dialog window?

Expected Behavior:

  • When opening the popup, the channel should be disabled so that it does not refresh the UIBB.
  • After closing the popup, the channel should be restored and start working again.

How can I properly disable and restore the channel without losing the connection? Should binding be handled differently or triggered at another point in the process?

Any advice would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Bulk upsert with return response in sap cap nodejs
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a scenario where bulk data needs to create or update. If record already exists it needs to update, if record does not exist then it needs to create. For that scenario using UPSERT query with node.js. But the query is only returning affected rows but we need what all records got successfully executed. Please let me know if UPSERT do return response like that or any alternatives.(Note: Please suggest only minimal queries needs to hit db).

Thanks,

Jani Basha Shaik.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM RFUI screen using EWM_MOBGUI service, Personalize with SAP Screen Personas
entry.content: how to enable autoenter functionality after scanning for EWM_MOBGUI

entry.title: Re: Settlement Management - Condition Contract - Business...
entry.content:
Hi @arindamsur, 

Here are the answers to your questions regarding Condition Contracts in SAP CCM:

1. Relation between Contract Header Customer and Customer in Business Volume Selection Criteria

  • The Customer at the Contract Header level represents the Rebate Recipient (unless configured otherwise via split logic or Transfer Manager).
  • The Customer in the Business Volume Selection Criteria represents the Sold-To Party from which transactions will be selected for rebate calculation.

2. i) Understanding the calculation of REBV (Rebate Business Volume Field)

  • SAP CCM allows multiple calculation bases for the same contract type.
  • The system determines the rebate base using the subtotal fields configured in the source document’s pricing procedure (e.g., VBRP-NETWR, VBRK-KZWIx).
  • The configuration in SPRO defines which pricing subtotals are used to determine the rebate base amount.

    ii) Invoice Types Considered in Business Volume Calculation
  • The Business Volume Table (CDS View) includes multiple Billing Document Types beyond just F2 (Standard Invoice).
  • It considers invoices relevant for rebates based on the logic in the CDS View.
  • To verify which Billing Document Types (e.g., S1, G2, L2, P5, P8) are included, you can analyze the logic within the CDS view used for business volume determination.

3. Viewing Invoice-wise REBV in WB2R_BUSVOL

  • In the Business Volume Report (WB2R_BUSVOL), you can adjust the Output Level Business Volume parameter in the selection screen or result screen to display invoice-level details.
  • This allows you to view REBV amounts at an invoice level and analyze rebate-relevant transactions accordingly.

Let me know if you need further clarification!

Best regards,
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to staging materials to a production order using pick list strategy
entry.content: Hello regarding your comment here "Pick parts staging can only be done for repetitive manufacturing through MF60 (App 'Stage Materials for Production')" I'm using this in my case of REM but when staging the materials the stage is not performed (the stage status is not changing and no save button). Do you have idea what could be the cause/ missing thing ?

entry.title: Re: ALM testing: how to disable testers from deleting the...
entry.content:
Hi Yuliya,

just wanted to share a recent update with regards to your question. 
Since last week there is a role-based restriction for test plan and test case deletions in SAP Cloud ALM.

To prevent accidental deletion of test results, the deletion of test cases with existing test runs is now restricted to users with the role Project Administrator or Project Lead.

Users with the Project Member role can delete test cases if those were not executed yet.

Same concerns Test Plan deletion.

Please refer to SAP Cloud ALM updates from 19.02.2025 (services Test Preparation and Test Plans) - https://help.sap.com/whats-new/0cb91c1ef73b400f881823f8d5fd2dea?locale=en-US


I hope it helps.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAL S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully Activated Appliance
entry.content:
Hi  MoritzSchulschenk ,

Your question is similar to https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/i-cannot-connect-to-it-ssh-rdp-or-sap-gui/qaq-p/13983156

In general, our recommendation is to check if the appliance is in state Active, then to check the ports restrictions of your appliance (if any).

For more information how to restrict your ports, please refer to our documentation. You could try at first to restrict to your own IP and retest the connectivity. If it works for you, the you could define an appropriate IP range if it is required in your case.

Best regards,

Tsvetinka

entry.title: Can "Review New Hire Step" skip in Onboarding 2.O Successfactors
entry.content: Can review new hire data from HRIS perspective be removed or skipped before we send the form to candidate for personal data collection?

entry.title: SAC Settlement time deviation
entry.content:
Hi everybody, 

and special thanks to @N1kh1l  & @MoonJun for your previous and precious help.

I'm trying to do the below and I'm not using correctly the advanced formulas with date.

I have 2 measures Incoming amount and Outgoing amount. I want to calculate the Settlement time deviation.
For that, I use a status dimension to move my incomes, my expected outcomes and actual outcomes in a "comparison layer"
As a result, I have 3 dates for the same transaction, and I need to compare the expected outcomes and actual outcomes and calculate the deviation. 
In the screenshot bellow, transaction 1's income was on January 4th, the expected settlement was on the 6th, in fact it was settled on the 7th - what I look for is 1 day of deviation.
the code I'm using is wrong:

 

DATA([d/Measures]="Time_deviation")=
	RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Outgoing",[d/IL_D_POC_RPD_STATUS]="STS_023",DAY([d/Date]))-
	RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Income",[d/IL_D_POC_RPD_STATUS]="STS_023",DAY([d/Date]))

 



Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Dear ExpertsI am getting an error- "Failed to get acc...
entry.content:
Dear Cossy 

Please first check note 3297866.

This usually happens, when the authentication service receives request using URL with server name which is not expected by it.

Please ensure, that the network address for the SLD server can be reached / pinged from the affected client computers

Using BOTH hostname / IP and also FQDN.

Please add to the local host file of the affected SBO Client computer

C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\host

an alias like :

<ip address of the SLD server> <hostname> <hostname.fqdn>

example :

10.23.22.281  mysldserver mysldserver.domain.com

save it (need to be in Administrator`s mode of notepad) and try again.

Please also check SAP Note  3237004 - Cannot Access the SLD Pages Directly at the First Login, 

that helps to resolve the authentication service page.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: Create an alert for one pay component recurring
entry.content: Hi, Yes for sure: We tried different ways: 1) Compensation information Modell (in CompInfo): we simply asked, if the value of this one specific pay component has changed: 2025-02-27 08_57_54-Configure Business Rules - SuccessFactors.png 2) Second way: 2025-02-27 09_27_22-Configure Business Rules - SuccessFactors.png 3) Third way: PayComponentRecurring with Base Object Compensation Modell: we created a pay component group where only this pay component is added. If the one pay component gets changed / deleted / .. the rule should get triggered. However when analysing the rule trace we do see, that we are not able to retrieve the value of the pay component in the pay component group. So there is never a value for the previous value of the paycomponent group.

entry.title: SAP Content Network (Transfer between two clients / Data Storage) Query
entry.content:
I am wondering the following scenario.

The customer already has a Productive and Test SAC Tenant.

1. To make organisational changes and separate the Data, the customer is considering getting another Productive and Test client. Is it possible to use the export/import SAP Content Network to do the transfer of objects from old (Test/Productive) to new (Test/Productive) clients?

2. During the data transfer, what type of data is stored in the SAP Content Network? Is it just the metadata or any additional data as well?

3. Are Planning Applications transported differently?

entry.title: Re: Customer Hierarchy In Condition Contract
entry.content:
Hi @Kadudas,

I believe you do not necessarily need to check the "Relevant for Rebate" checkbox for hierarchy nodes in VDH1N. However, the "Relevant for Pricing" checkbox may or may not be required depending on the configuration of your Profile of Business Volume in SAP CCM.



I recommend reviewing your Business Volume Profile settings to determine whether pricing relevance is needed for your specific rebate calculation scenario.

Best regards,
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: SAP Successfactors National ID Section to be mandatory in Employee Central and onboarding 2.O
entry.content:
Can we make the National ID Section mandatory, also bank details in Candidate onboarding 2.O in personal data collection step in successfactors.

So, the details can be flown in Employee Central.

entry.title: On Integration Suite page, left menu items are not visible except "Home"

Hi Guys,

I can see only "Home" items on Integration Suite home page but have no idea how to set another left menu items  like "Discover", "Design", "Test" etc.

Please help me~~

entry.title: The Meeting Point is Rotterdam!
entry.content:
We are pleased to announce the release of the SAP Newsletter for the upcoming Energy and Utilities Conference in Rotterdam, scheduled for April 8-10. 

This edition is a valuable resource for all attendees to gain more details and plan their conference days. We have prepared many overview videos from topic experts and SAP industry leaders, along with insightful blogs and articles to highlight the upcoming event.

The SAP For Energy and Utilities Conference 2025 is a knowledge hub that addresses significant industry topics such as AI, RISE with SAP, GROW with SAP, Asset Management, Customer Experience, Distributed Energy Resources, Water, and Sustainability, with specific attention to the Oil, Gas, Energy, and Utilities sectors.

Participate in expert sessions, microforums, keynote speeches, panel discussions, and customer presentations. These insightful sessions will take place during both the pre-conference and main conference days. Be sure to explore the SAP Pop-up Campus, featuring an innovative 180° storytelling experience that promises to be both immersive and interactive.

The conference app will be available soon, enhancing your networking opportunities and streamlining navigation throughout the event.

We encourage attendees to participate in a range of networking events, including the evening reception hosted by Capgemini, a Business Women’s Networking Lunch, and a memorable evening event on the OceanDiva boat. These gatherings are excellent chances to build valuable connections within the industry.

Join us in collaboratively shaping the future of energy!

See you in Rotterdam!

entry.title: Re: Audit Trail needed for the Master Data of Customer Pr...
entry.content: Hi - This app does not display Project ID in output.

entry.title: Re: FICA Account balance function module
entry.content: Something like BAPI_CTRACCONTRACTACCOUNT_GBAL or FKK_LINE_ITEMS_WITH_SELECTIONS?

entry.title: Unlocking Scope 3 Transparency with SAP Sustainability Data Exchange - Deep Dive & Demo
entry.content:
SAP Sustainability Data Exchange (SDX) provides a seamless, automated solution for exchanging product carbon footprint (PCF) data, ensuring compliance with global standards and enabling data-driven sustainability decisions.

If you’re a sustainability lead, supply chain professional, or technical expert working on emissions tracking, this deep dive session is essential viewing. It offers a comprehensive walkthrough of SDX’s capabilities and how businesses can implement it to scale sustainability reporting.

Key Benefits of SAP Sustainability Data Exchange

SAP SDX is designed to facilitate efficient, accurate, and standardized PCF data sharing across the value chain. Here's how:

1. Standardized, Interoperable Data Exchange

  • Built to support industry standards like WBCSD PACT and Catena-X, ensuring data compatibility across networks.
  • Maintains data sovereignty, allowing companies to control their shared data.

2. Efficient Supplier Data Requests

  • Buyers can request supplier-specific PCF data for purchased products.
  • Bulk request capabilities streamline data collection from multiple partners at once.

3. Centralized PCF Inventory & Audit Readiness

  • Consolidated view of all purchased and finished product footprints.
  • Ensures compliance with ESG regulations and simplifies audit processes.

4. Direct Integration with SAP & Third-Party Tools

  • Easily integrates with SAP Sustainability Footprint Management, ERP systems, and APIs for real-time data updates.
  • Enables suppliers to share PCF data at scale with their buyers.

For a more detailed technical breakdown, explore the official Deep Dive PDF.

Why You Should Watch the Deep Dive Session

Understanding the full potential of SAP SDX is crucial for businesses looking to:
✔ Move from estimated to actual emissions data and improve reporting accuracy.
✔ Ensure compliance with evolving ESG regulations.
✔ Identify CO₂ reduction hotspots and make informed decisions.
✔ Automate emissions tracking across complex supply chains.

This on-demand deep dive video will walk you through real use cases, live demos, and best practices for implementing SDX in your sustainability strategy. Watch it here.

Take the Next Step – Try SAP SDX for Free

To experience SDX firsthand, SAP offers a free 30-day trial where you can explore its functionalities with sample data and guided processes. This is your opportunity to see how SDX can help your business enhance supply chain transparency and streamline carbon reporting.

➡ Start your free trial now!

Have questions or looking for implementation guidance? Reach out to us—we’re here to help you drive sustainability forward. 🚀

 

#sapsustainabilitydataexchange #sapfootprintmanagement #sapsustainabilitycontroltower #sapbusinessnetwork

entry.title: Re: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed
entry.content: I don't want to duplicate the text symbol values. I want to just access the existing values.

entry.title: Re: Need insights on SuccessFactors Evergreen requisitions functionality
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m exploring the possibility of configuring a single job requisition template with the evergreen functionality in the environment. The escenario is both parent and child job requisitions share the same XML structure. According to <a href="https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/E/2858914" target="_blank">KBA 2858914</a>, this should be feasible.

I’d appreciate any insights or best practices on implementing this setup. Specifically:

  • Are there any limitations or challenges when using a unified XML for parent and child requisitions

Has anyone successfully implemented this approach? Any recommendations or lessons learned would be highly valuable.

Looking forward to your feedback!

entry.title: Re: Unable to pull TODO URL’s for certain categories
entry.content:
Hi Karen,
So I understand that this is an intended behavior, but I still have a question if it's possible to retrieve todo's URL for these categories with OData Api? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: User Managment IAS/Azure
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m looking for best practices for user management in IAS in connection with Azure AD and SAP Cloud Apps.

Current situation:

  • If a user is deleted or deactivated in Azure AD, they are also removed from SAP Cloud Apps (including content, e.g., in SAC) and lose access to all cloud apps, including non-SAP apps.
  • If a user is removed from an Azure AD group, they also lose access to SAP Cloud Apps (including content, e.g., in SAC).

Our requirement:

  • The user (Azure AD ) should only be deactivated for SAP Cloud Apps but should still have access to non-SAP apps (which are also connected to the same Azure tenant).

Is there a way to control access in a more targeted way without deactivating or deleting the user in Azure AD for all apps (inc. non-SAP apps)  ?

Many Thanks

entry.title: Hierarchy Extractors Are Not Displayed by ODP
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have the following scenario:

SAP ERP activates the 0COSTELMNT_0102_HIER extractor using the T SE38 BS_ANLY_DS_RELEASE_ODP and also uses RODPS_OS_EXPOSE.

RSA6 is checked and comes out active.

then I check the ROOTATTR table and the extractor is not there.

I show the version that is currently available.

Note: No hierarchy extractors are displayed in Datasphere, but ATTRs and TXTs are displayed

Any solution? or why I can't activate them by ODP to view them in Datasphere?

Thank you for your collaboration.

entry.title: Taxonomy Adjustment for Electronic Reports in the Netherlands
entry.content:
Welcome to my blog post on updating the taxonomy for electronic reports in the Netherlands localization of SAP Business One.

The taxonomy for XBRL files for the BAS Report and ICP in the Netherlands is subject to annual changes. This blog post will guide you through the process of adjusting the taxonomy in SAP Business One on your own, without any help from others. The adjustment is needed in:

  • Taxonomy for electronic tax reports
  • Electronic File Manager

Adjust Taxonomy for Electronic Tax Reports

Definitions:

Omzetbelasting = OB aangifte = BAS Report 

ICP = ICP Opgaaf = EU Sales Report

Path:

1. Go to Aansluit Suite Digipoort (procesinfrastructuur.nl)

2. Download the file Berichtsoortentabel; (My example is from 2024, but you can proceed similarly for 2025.)

3. Please open the Excel sheet and apply a filter on the tab Berichtsoort, field Versie:

  • Omzetbelasting
  • ICP

4. Copy the entry points (e.g. http://www.nltaxonomie.nl/nt18/bd/20231213/entrypoints/bd-rpt-icp-opgaaf-2024.xsd )

Please update the entry point in the Electronic File Manager.

1. Please open the SAP Business One

2. Go to: Tools > Electronic File Manager

3. Open the Format

4. Right - click on Target (NT*) and select "Update"

5. Copy the entry point in URL and select "Add". This process may take some time. Click "OK" when finished.

This may take a while. A new Target tree has been created and the mapping has been transferred to the new target.

6. Remove the outdated target and update the name of the new tree to the most recent version number.

7. Please update the name of the file to reflect the correct year.

8. Save the file with the correct year.

The BAS Report update must be followed using the exact same procedure.

I hope you find this how-to guide helpful.

If you have any comments or suggestions, please let us know in the Comments section found below the Blog.

Best regards,

Ingrid Macova

entry.title: Creativity and innovation course
entry.content:
https://www.udemy.com/course/innovation-and-creativity-energy-ice/?referralCode=7662C8166045364FEC10 

I found it useful as a mind massaging session

entry.title: Re: User Managment IAS/Azure
entry.content:
@tskwin 

you will have to define the group in Azure AD to have that assigned to user and when user syncs to SAP IAS and SAC you will filter those fields according to the group defined to the particular application. 

In this way user will access the application based on Single Sign On matching to Azure AD and group with authroization access.

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the co...
entry.content: You cannot perform the restore on the same database server where the source database is currently running. You either need to stop the source database -or- run a different engine during the restore. in short, if you are restoring a database from backup, the source database would be expected to be in a bad state and not be running.  There are viable ways to achieve your requirements in the existing implementation, either archive or the more modern image backup methods.

entry.title: Custom Adapter Module: Can I Deploy Third-Party Dependencies as External Jar to AS Java ?
entry.content:
Hello experts.

NWDS: 7.5 | PI: 7.5 | JDK: 1.8

I created an adapter module that requires 1 external library:
jsch-0.2.22.jar

I've noticed that when I include libraries that are used in existing Java Mapping (just for testing) among them:

xercesImpl-2.6.2-jaxb-1.0.6

jdom2-2.0.6

the module deployment is successful, but when jsch-0.2.22.jar its add it or some another third-party libraries for debugging reasons I get an error on the deployment.

Do you think there might be some restriction with third-party libraries other than that are allowed in AS Java for security reasons? Something like a security pipeline in the AS Java server?

Deployment Error

Testing Libraries: red = deployment KO | green = Deployment OK)

EAR File:

This EAR deploy for example result in error because gson library.

entry.title: Re: Story data dictionary (Not the old learning one)
entry.content: Some clients use OData API Data Dictionary in Sf, that helps them to find the right table and then field. However, personally I think that you need to have at least a basic knowledge of SF and then you will easily find what you need. For example, if you know that Gender is a part of Personal information in Employee profile, you can easily find "Personal information" table in the Query and field Gender will be located there. Just check the in the module itself first and then apply the same logic in the Query. I've been working with the tool for more than 2 years and I've never used any online guidance, it's always possible to find the field manually knowing the system a bit (unless this field is reportable of course). Sometimes mdf objects might be not reportable by default and this could be a reason why you can't find it in your Story.

entry.title: Unable to Create Connection in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi All,

i'm Trying to create connection to the SAP in the Build Process automation , But i'm getting the error "Unable to Set Connection".

Followed SAP KBA Note - 3422487 
Only 2 points mentioned in it :

  1. To correctly create a BAPI Action Group, make sure to correctly use the parameters and follow the steps described in: BAPI Action Group.
  2. Make sure enabled the SAP Build Process Automation extension in the browser
    Followed Both but still facing error .
    Note : 
    1.The Credentials that i'm using to connect to SAP are working, even using the same details i'm able to connect from Power platform to SAP.
    2. Extension in browser is in Active.
  3. In the Browser Console this is what i'm getting : 

 

{
  "isBuiltError": true,
  "action": "BAPIRequest",
  "code": "NO_RESPONSE",
  "exception": "",
  "jsonData": "{\n    \"method\": \"BAPIRequest\",\n    \"requestName\": \"SetConnection\",\n    \"requestData\": \"{\\\"Data\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"NAME\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"rFCGroup\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"USER\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"******\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"PASSWD\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"******\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"ASHOST\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"******\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"SYSNR\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"80\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"CLIENT\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"100\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"LANG\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"SYSID\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"SNC_MODE\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"0\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"SNC_PARTNERNAME\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"MSHOST\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"MSSERV\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"GROUP\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"SAPROUTER\\\\\\\":null}\\\"}\"\n}",
  "level": "error",
  "message": undefined,
  "originalError": {
    "code": "NO_RESPONSE",
    "type": "error",
    "jsonData": "{\n    \"method\": \"BAPIRequest\",\n    \"requestName\": \"SetConnection\",\n    \"requestData\": \"{\\\"Data\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"NAME\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"rFCGroup\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"USER\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"******\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"PASSWD\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"******\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"ASHOST\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"******\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"SYSNR\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"80\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"CLIENT\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"100\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"LANG\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"SYSID\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"SNC_MODE\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"0\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"SNC_PARTNERNAME\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"MSHOST\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"MSSERV\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"GROUP\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\"SAPROUTER\\\\\\\":null}\\\"}\"\n}"
  },
  "method": "BAPIRequest",
  "tip": "",
  "title": null
}
​I have masked my personal Credentials with *****.

 

 Any one please help.

@Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: External Pricing in C4C Sales Quote not fetching Z Condition types from S4 HANA System

2 - Code List Mapping completed for the 2 new Condition Types

3 - Configuration completed in S4 HANA Pricing Procedure 

Can anyone suggest what is missing?

Regards, Basil

entry.title: Annualized Salary (custom field) is not automatically populating for Pay Component: Hourly
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

@xavierlegarrec 

We have an Annualized Salary (custom field)

This field is not automatically populating based on the Hourly Rate in the New Hire Screen.

Please note the trace below:

The expression 'payComponentRecurringModel.employmentInfoModel.jobInfoModel.jobInfo_standard_hours.value' is considered to be NULL, as the property 'employmentInfoModel' of 'payComponentRecurringModel' is found to be NULL at 'payComponentRecurringModel.employmentInfoModel'.
 

It seems like the path to get the Standard Weekly hours is incorrect? Please assist

 

Any assistance will be appreciated.

 

Thank you!

Ashlin

entry.title: Changes Introduced in APIRule v2alpha1 and v2
entry.content:
APIRule custom resource (CR) in version v1beta1 has been deprecated and will be removed on May 12, 2025. Version v2alpha1, introduced for testing purposes, will become deprecated on March 31, 2025, and removed on June 16, 2025. The stable APIRule v2 is planned to be introduced in the regular channel on March 31, 2025. For more information on the timelines, see APIRule migration - timelines.

To migrate your APIRule CRs to version v2, follow the procedure described in the blog posts APIRule migration - noAuth and jwt handlers and APIRule migration - Ory Oathkeeper based OAuth2 handlers. Since the APIRule CRD v2alpha1 is identical to v2, the migration procedure for both versions is the same.

This blog post presents all the significant changes introduced in APIRule v2alpha1 and v2. Since version v2alpha1 is identical to the stable version v2, you must consider these changes when migrating either to version v2 or v2alpha1.

A Workload Must Be in the Istio Service Mesh

To use APIRules in versions v2 or v2alpha1, the workload that an APIRule exposes must be in the Istio service mesh. If the workload is not inside the Istio service mesh, the APIRule does not work as expected.

Required action: To add a workload to the Istio service mesh, enable Istio sidecar proxy injection.

CORS Policy Is Not Applied by Default

Version v1beta1 applied the following CORS configuration by default:

Access-Control-Allow-Origins: "*"
Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,PATCH"
Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "Authorization,Content-Type,*"Copy to clipboardErrorCopied

Versions v2 and v2alpha1 do not apply these default values. If the corsPolicy field is empty, the CORS configuration is not applied. For more information, see architecture decision record #752.

Required action: To use default CORS values defined in the APIRule v1beta1, you must explicitly define them in the corsPolicy field.

Path Specification Must Not Contain Regexp

APIRule in versions v2 and v2alpha1 does not support regexp in the spec.rules.path field of APIRule CR. Instead, it supports the use of the {*} and {**} operators. See the supported configurations:

  • Use the exact path (for example, /abc). It matches the specified path exactly.
  • Use the {*} operator (for example, /foo/{*} or /foo/{*}/bar). This operator represents any request that matches the given pattern, with exactly one path segment replacing the operator.
  • Use the {**} operator (for example, /foo/{**} or /foo/{**}/bar). This operator represents any request that matches the pattern with zero or more path segments in the operator’s place. It must be the last operator in the path.
  • Use the wildcard path /*, which matches all paths. It’s equivalent to the /{**} path. If your configuration in APIRule v1beta1 used such a path as /foo(.*), when migrating to the new versions, you must define configurations for two separate paths: /foo and /foo/{**}.

For more information on the APIRule specification, see APIRule v2alpha1 Custom Resource.

Required action: Replace regexp expressions in the spec.rules.path field of your APIRule CRs with the {*} and {**} operators.

JWT Configuration Requires Explicit Issuer URL

Versions v2 and v2alpha1 of APIRule introduce an additional mandatory configuration filed for JWT-based authorization - issuer. You must provide an explicit issuer URL in the APIRule CR. See an example configuration:

rules:
- jwt:
    authentications:
        -   issuer: {YOUR_ISSUER_URL}
            jwksUri: {YOUR_JWKS_URI}

If you use Cloud Identity Services, you can find the issuer URL in the OIDC well-known configuration at https://{YOUR_TENANT}.accounts.ondemand.com/.well-known/openid-configuration.

Required action: Add the issuer field to your APIRule specification when migrating to the new version. For more information on migration procedure for the jwt handler, see SAP BTP, Kyma runtime: APIRule migration - noAuth and jwt handlers.

Removed Support for Oathkeeper

In one of the releases after 3.1.0, Oathkeeper will be moved to its own namespace. Support for Oathkeeper will be removed later. Once the support is removed, Oathkeeper will be installed in the clusters, but the API Gateway module will neither use it nor manage it.

Removed Support for Oauthkeeper OAuth2 Handlers

The APIRule CR in versions v2 and v2alpha1 does not support Oathkeeper OAuth2 handlers. Instead, it introduces the extAuth field, which you can use to configure an external authorizer.

Required action: Migrate your Oathkeeper-based OAuth2 handlers to use an external authorizer. To learn how to do this, see SAP BTP, Kyma runtime: APIRule migration - Ory Oathkeeper-based OAuth2 handlers and Configuration of the extAuth Access Strategy.

Removed Support for Oauthkeeper Mutators

The APIRule CR in versions v2 and v2alpha1 does not support Oathkeeper mutators. Request mutators are replaced with request modifiers defined in the spec.rule.request section of the APIRule CR. This section contains the request modification rules applied before the request is forwarded to the target workload. Token mutators are not supported in APIRules v2 and v2alpha1. For that, you must define your own extAuth configuration.

Required action: Migrate your rules that rely on Oathkeeper mutators to use request modifiers or an external authorizer. For more information, see Configuration of the extAuth Access Strategy and APIRule v2alpha1 Custom Resource.

Removed Support for Opaque Tokens

The APIRule CR in versions v2 and v2alpha1 does not support the usage of Opaque tokens. Instead, it introduces the extAuth field, which you can use to configure an external authorizer.

Required action: Migrate your rules that use Opaque tokens to use an external authorizer. For more information, see Configuration of the extAuth Access Strategy.
